description.ko: 바다의 가장 깊고 어두운 곳을 밝히는 거대하고 투명한 생명체와의 평화로운 만남입니다.
description.en: A peaceful encounter with a giant, transparent lifeform that illuminates the darkest depths of the ocean.

prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic 8k render of a massive translucent whale-like entity in the AQUA-5 zone. The creature's body is composed of glowing #40E0D0 turquoise bubbles and #48D1CC teal bioluminescent membranes, drifting through the dark #000080 midnight zone. Schools of translucent glass fish swim through fluid #006994 ocean currents and marine snow. Volumetric lighting captures the serene, high-pressure atmosphere of the deep sea. Ray-traced reflections.
